summary: Phase 5 SEO & PageSpeed testing complete. All features working correctly: 1) Dynamic meta-tags with react-helmet-async (OpenGraph + Twitter Cards), 2) JSON-LD structured data (Organization, LocalBusiness/TravelAgency, Article), 3) Dynamic sitemap.xml with all pages and empresas/articulos, 4) Code splitting with React.lazy for Mapa, Nosotros, Prensa, and admin pages.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/sitemap.xml returns valid XML with correct content-type
Backend: Sitemap contains all static pages (/, /empresas, /mapa, /prensa, /nosotros)
Backend: Sitemap includes /empresas/{slug} entries for each active empresa
Backend: Sitemap includes /prensa/{slug} entries for published articulos
Backend: Sitemap URLs have loc, lastmod, changefreq, priority elements
Frontend: Home page title = 'Inicio | Clúster de Turismo de Naturaleza y Aventura Jalisco'
Frontend: Home page has og:title, og:description, og:image meta tags
Frontend: Home page has JSON-LD Organization schema
Frontend: Home page has twitter:card = 'summary_large_image'
Frontend: Empresas page title contains 'Directorio de Empresas'
Frontend: Empresas page has og:description about turismo de naturaleza
Frontend: Empresas page has canonical URL set correctly
Frontend: Empresa detail (ecomuk) has dynamic title with empresa name
Frontend: Empresa detail has og:type = 'business.business'
Frontend: Empresa detail (Capacitación) has JSON-LD EducationalOrganization schema
Frontend: Empresa detail JSON-LD includes telephone, address, geo coordinates
Frontend: Empresa detail (Operadora de aventura) has JSON-LD TravelAgency schema
Frontend: Prensa page title = 'Prensa y Noticias | Clúster...'
Frontend: Prensa page has og:title and og:description
Frontend: Articulo detail has dynamic title with article name and 'Prensa'
Frontend: Articulo detail has og:type = 'article'
Frontend: Articulo detail has JSON-LD Article schema with headline and publisher
Frontend: Nosotros page title contains 'Nosotros'
Frontend: Nosotros page has canonical URL set correctly
Frontend: Mapa page title contains 'Mapa de Empresas'
Frontend: Mapa page has canonical URL set correctly
Frontend: All public pages load without runtime errors
Frontend: No console errors detected during navigation
Code splitting: React.lazy used for Mapa, Nosotros, Prensa, ArticuloDetalle
Code splitting: All admin pages are lazy loaded
Code splitting: Suspense fallback shows loading spinner
critical_code_review_comments: SEO.jsx: PageSEO, EmpresaSEO, ArticuloSEO, OrganizationSEO components properly implemented
SEO.jsx: SCHEMA_TYPE_MAP correctly maps categories to Schema.org types (Operadora de aventura -> TravelAgency, Capacitación -> EducationalOrganization)
SEO.jsx: JSON-LD includes conditional fields (telephone, address, geo, sameAs) when available
index.js: HelmetProvider correctly wraps the App component
App.js: React.lazy properly used for non-critical pages (Mapa, Nosotros, Prensa, ArticuloDetalle)
App.js: All admin pages are lazy loaded for better initial load performance
App.js: Suspense wrapper with PageLoader fallback component
server.py: /api/sitemap.xml endpoint generates valid XML with all public pages and dynamic content
server.py: Sitemap uses SITE_URL env var with fallback to preview URL
seed_data_creation: Used existing seed data (Ecomuk, Aventurate por Jalisco empresas and Bienvenidos articulo)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 5 SEO features fully tested and working. All meta tags (OpenGraph, Twitter Cards) are dynamically generated via react-helmet-async. JSON-LD structured data is correctly implemented for Organization (home), LocalBusiness/TravelAgency (empresa detail based on category), and Article (articulo detail). Sitemap.xml is dynamically generated from MongoDB with all static pages and dynamic empresa/articulo entries. Code splitting is implemented with React.lazy for non-critical pages.

meta_tags.og:title: Dynamic per page
meta_tags.og:image: Default cluster logo or entity image
